ast.name: error
ast.source: Note Illustrator: Could not load placeholder image to read dimensions.
ast.target: 笔记插图：无法加载占位符图像以读取尺寸。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The Markdown heading level to search for (e.g., #, ##, ###).
ast.target: 要搜索的Markdown标题级别（例如：#、##、###）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The text of the heading to search for (e.g., 'Description').
ast.target: 要搜索的标题文本（例如：“描述”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your API key from OpenAI (or compatible service).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The URL for the image generation API (OpenAI-compatible).

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The model name to request from the API.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of all filenames that should be detected as placeholders (one file per line).
ast.target: 应检测为占位符的所有文件名列表（每行一个文件）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the folder where new images will be saved (will be created automatically).
ast.target: 新图像将保存到的文件夹名称（将自动创建）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The DALL-E 3 size to use when 'Smart Sizing' is disabled. Ignored by other models.
ast.target: 当“智能调整大小”禁用时使用的DALL-E 3尺寸。其他模型会忽略此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the plugin will also update the 'Image:' (or 'image:') key in the note's frontmatter to the new filename.
ast.target: 如果启用，插件还会将笔记前置元数据中的“Image:”（或“image:”）键更新为新文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text that is automatically added before your description to define the style.
ast.target: 在描述前自动添加的文本，用于定义风格。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: Obsidian TTRPG社区保险库兼容性

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: A detailed D&D fantasy art portrait of:
ast.target: 一幅详细的D&D奇幻艺术肖像：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: API Key or Endpoint is missing. Please check plugin settings.
ast.target: API密钥或端点缺失。请检查插件设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No placeholder filenames defined in settings.
ast.target: 设置中未定义占位符文件名。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No placeholder or previously generated image found to replace.
ast.target: 未找到可替换的占位符或先前生成的图像。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Smart Sizing: Could not read placeholder dimensions. Using default format.
ast.target: 智能调整大小：无法读取占位符尺寸。使用默认格式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Smart Sizing: Placeholder file not found. Using default format.
ast.target: 智能调整大小：未找到占位符文件。使用默认格式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Image successfully generated and placeholder replaced!
ast.target: 图像生成成功，占位符已替换！

ast.name: name
ast.source: Generate Image from Description & Replace Placeholder
ast.target: 根据描述生成图像并替换占位符

ast.name: text
ast.source: A generated image already exists in this note. Do you want to replace it with a new one?
ast.target: 此笔记中已存在生成的图像。您想用新的替换它吗？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Defines the heading to use as the image prompt.
ast.target: 定义用作图像提示的标题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configures the API and image details.
